title: Indexing Cleanup Plan — DO NOT EXECUTE WITHOUT APPROVAL
status: PLAN_ONLY — awaiting Qasem approval for execution

urgent_safe_now.effect: Reduce crawl waste, improve Google trust

urgent_safe_now.action: Verify noindex pages NOT in sitemap
Fix any 404 URL with active internal links
urgent_safe_now.effect: Better user experience, less crawl waste

fixes_needing_approval.action: Recreate high-value 404 pages that should exist
fixes_needing_approval.reason: Need to verify page was valuable before recreating

fixes_needing_approval.action: Reduce tool variant count in sitemap (225→clean only)
fixes_needing_approval.reason: May reduce discovery of some useful variants

cleanup_candidates.action: Noindex remaining thin discovered-not-indexed pages (D/E/F class)
Remove empty scenario sitemap from robots.txt
cleanup_candidates.reason: Empty sitemap declared but not needed

noindex_intended.action: KEEP noindex on geo pages (591), formula tools (~386), thin scenarios (~2,059)

sitemap_removal_candidates.action: Thin tool variants with no impressions

redirect_candidates.action: 301 redirect valuable 404 pages to closest live page

leave_as_is.action: Alternative canonical pages (41) — canonical is working
Crawled not indexed (5) — too few to matter
Redirect page (1) — verify correct then leave

execution_gate: Qasem must approve ANY cleanup execution. This plan is for review only.
estimated_impact: After cleanup: crawl waste reduced ~30-50%, clearer indexing signals, Google trust should improve over 14-30 days
